source.title: iPhone 16 price comparison across PDD, Taobao, JD during 618 2025

extractions.claim: iPhone 16 Pro 128GB pricing: Pinduoduo 5,398 RMB (with national subsidy stacking) vs Taobao 百亿补贴 ~5,500 RMB vs JD ~5,500 RMB (758 USD). Pinduoduo offers up to 2,601 RMB discount off official 7,999 RMB price.
extractions.evidence: During 618 2025: PDD百亿补贴 channel iPhone 16 Pro 128GB at 5,398 RMB after stacking national subsidies (reduction of 2,601 RMB vs official 7,999 RMB). JD.com selling 128GB iPhone 16 Pro at ~$758 (~5,500 RMB), ~$350 below regular price. Taobao百亿补贴 iPhone 16 Pro Max 256GB at 7,558 RMB and 512GB at 9,548 RMB (2,441-2,451 RMB cheaper than official). On Pro Max models, PDD and Taobao prices are basically the same.

verification.verifier_notes: Prices from 36kr 618 2025 analysis and Benzinga reports on iPhone 16 China pricing. Multiple sources confirm PDD and Taobao compete neck-and-neck on flagship iPhones, JD slightly higher.

extractions.claim: iPhone 17 series (Nov 2025): Pinduoduo百亿补贴 pushed 256GB price below 5,000 RMB — nearly 1,000 RMB below official price. JD Pro Max/Pro versions saw 300 RMB direct cut from 5,999 RMB launch price.
extractions.evidence: Per Sina Finance (Nov 2025): PDD百亿补贴 strategy pulled iPhone 17 256GB to below 5,000 RMB. JD iPhone 17 Pro Max 12+512GB at 8,699 RMB after coupons. PDD subsidy timing is unpredictable and prices fluctuate more than JD.

verification.verifier_notes: Sina Finance November 2025 report on iPhone 17 pricing across platforms
